heading: Decision about airport noise and access restrictions on certain stage 2 aircraft
label: 47525 Decision about airport noise and access restrictions on certain stage 2 aircraft
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)4752549 App.:2154., , .Nov. 5, 1990Pub. L. 101–508, § 9305104 Stat. 1388–382In this section, before clause (1), the words “conduct a study and decide on” are substituted for “determine by a study” for clarity. The words “with a maximum weight of not more than” are substituted for “weighing less than” for consistency with sections 47528 and 47529 of the revised title.
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)4752549 App.:2154., , .Nov. 5, 1990Pub. The words “with a maximum weight of not more than” are substituted for “weighing less than” for consistency with sections 47528 and 47529 of the revised title.

children.text: noise levels produced by those aircraft relative to other aircraft;
the benefits to general aviation and the need for efficiency in the national air transportation system;
the differences in the nature of operations at airports and the areas immediately surrounding the airports;
international standards and agreements on aircraft noise; and
other factors the Secretary considers necessary.
